metadata.name: Drona
metadata.primary_role: Supreme martial teacher of both Pandavas and Kauravas / Brahmin warrior / Father of Ashwatthama
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Brahmin, son of sage Bharadvaja, teacher at Hastinapur)
metadata.divine_origin: Born from a pot (Drona = pot), Brahmin by birth but supreme warrior by training, learned all weapons from Parashurama

timelines.context_description: Dronacharya as the supreme martial guru — the man who taught both Pandavas and Kauravas, demanded Ekalavya's thumb, and fought against his own students in the war.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Fair aged complexion with the dual radiance of a Brahmin's spiritual learning and a warrior's battle-fire, unusual combination
physical_appearance.height: Tall and imposing despite age — carries himself with the double authority of a teacher and a commander
physical_appearance.build: Lean but incredibly capable warrior's build maintained into old age — wiry steel-strong arms, the precision muscles of a master archer, a Brahmin's lean discipline combined with a Kshatriya's combat power
physical_appearance.facial_features: Stern authoritative face of the ultimate teacher — sharp intelligent eyes that evaluate instantly, prominent nose, well-trimmed grey-white beard and mustache, high intelligent forehead, expression that can shift from approving warmth to terrifying displeasure in an instant, the face students both adore and fear
physical_appearance.hair: Grey-white hair in a disciplined sage-warrior style — part sage's knot, part warrior's topknot, reflecting his dual nature
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: His dual nature is his mark — he wears the sacred thread of a Brahmin and the arm-guards of a warrior simultaneously, his teaching posture (arms crossed, evaluating students) is iconic, his attachment to his son Ashwatthama is his fatal weakness

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: A unique blend of sage and warrior garments — white Brahmin dhoti with leather warrior elements, a teacher's shawl over battle-ready clothing, always prepared for both the classroom and the battlefield
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Sacred thread prominently displayed alongside warrior's arm-guards, a teacher's ring, a sage's Kamandalu hung at his waist, minimal gold — Brahmin simplicity with warrior practicality
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: Complete mastery of ALL weapons — divine and mundane, he possesses every celestial weapon (Astra), his bow, but also his teaching staff which is itself a weapon, the Brahmastra he reserves as his ultimate weapon

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Stern, commanding, the voice that shaped the greatest warriors of the age — can be warmly approving or cutting in disappointment, absolutely authoritative
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Sharp commanding baritone — the classic teacher's voice that carries across training grounds, precise and clear, cuts through noise
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with pedagogical authority — short commands during training ('Again!'), elaborate technical explanations of combat theory, his voice is the one all warriors hear in their memories, capable of devastating character assessments of his students
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Stern professional pride in his students, complex favoritism (prefers Arjuna), the teacher's burden of fighting against his own creations, paternal obsession with Ashwatthama's survival

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Commanding cinematic shot of Guru Dronacharya, age 60. Fair complexion with dual sage-warrior radiance. Stern intelligent face, sharp evaluating eyes, grey-white beard, high forehead. Lean powerful build in white Brahmin garments with warrior elements. Sacred thread and arm-guards visible. Standing on a training ground, arms crossed, evaluating young warriors practicing below. Grand outdoor arena of Hastinapur. 3D Pixar style, sharp disciplined lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A sharp, commanding male baritone. The classic teacher's voice that carries across grounds. Precisely clear, authoritative. Age approximately 60 years.
